ToolDetail.sidebarBody: Open the official site to review current features and pricing.
ToolDetail.disclaimer: AI Discovery is not the official provider of these tools. Features and pricing may change over time.
ToolDetail.trustPricing: Verify pricing and features with the provider
ToolDetail.trustCompare: Compare similar tools before you decide
ToolDetail.similarSubheading: Quickly compare alternatives in the same use case before deciding.
ToolDetail.similarReasonSame: Offers a similar use case in the same category.
ToolDetail.similarReasonAlt: An alternative AI tool that can complete your discovery list.
ToolDetail.similarFallbackDesc: This tool can be a solid alternative for your list.
ToolDetail.linkValidDesc: Automated checks show the link is reachable.
ToolDetail.linkReviewDesc: Some sites flag automated checks due to bot protection.
ToolDetail.linkInvalidDesc: Automated checks found a problem with the link.
ToolDetail.linkPendingDesc: If something looks wrong, you can report the link.
ToolDetail.loginToRate: Sign in to rate this tool.
ToolDetail.loginToComment: Sign in to leave a comment.
ToolDetail.loginToPrompt: Sign in to add a prompt
ToolDetail.promptsSubheading: Discover and vote on the best prompts shared for this tool.
ToolDetail.promptsEmpty: No prompts yet for this tool. Be the first to share one.
ToolDetail.commentsEmptyHint: Write the first comment — help the community.
ToolDetail.commentsEmpty: No comments yet. Be the first to write one!
ToolDetail.commentPlaceholder: What do you think about this tool?
ToolDetail.commentTip: Keep it short, clear, and useful.
ToolDetail.commentDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
ToolDetail.howToDecideBody: Compare pricing, platform fit, and similar tools. Verify current plans on the official site, then check community ratings and comments.
ToolDetail.faqWhatIsFallback: {name} is an AI tool listed in the AI Discovery catalog.
ToolDetail.faqPricingA: Listed pricing model: {pricing}. Always verify current plans on the official site.
ToolDetail.faqLinkA: Automated link status: {status}. Check this before opening the official site for {name}; report issues if something looks wrong.
ToolDetail.faqUpdatedA: Catalog record: {date}. Features and pricing may change at the provider.
ToolDetail.faqCompareQ: How do I compare {name} with alternatives?
ToolDetail.faqCompareA: Use the alternatives table below, or open Compare and select {name} next to other tools.
ToolDetail.alternativesSubheading: Rating, pricing, and platform snapshot vs tools in the same category
ToolDetail.alternativesNote: Ratings are community-driven. Verify pricing and features on official sites.
